# PERF-85 positive: sqlx.Named inside a tight loop
lang: go
file: PERF-085-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

type Row struct {
	ID   int64
	Name string
}

func InsertAll(db *sqlx.DB, rows []Row) error {
	for _, r := range rows {
		_, err := sqlx.NamedExec(db, "INSERT INTO t (id, name) VALUES (:id, :name)", r)
		if err != nil {
			return err
		}
	}
	return nil
}
